speaker: speaker1
text: Hello , Daisy , how are you doing ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Fine , thank you . I haven ’ t seen you for quite some time . What have you been up to recently ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I have been spending a lot of time watching movies at home , so you wouldn't have seen me . Recently , I've been obsessed with horror films .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , how can you be infatuated with horror films ? They're so scary .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yeah , you are right I used to not watch horror films , but after seeing Silence of the Lamb with Mike last month , I fell in love with them .

speaker: speaker2
text: It's amazing . But if I were you , I wouldn't have the courage to watch the first one .

speaker: speaker2
text: Maybe , but I would rather watch romance , science fiction , crime or even disaster movie instead of a horror picture . I wouldn't dare sleep at night after watching one .

speaker: speaker1
text: Basically . you'll watch any type of movie except horror .

speaker: speaker1
text: I think you should have a try someday . Maybe you'll change your mind .

speaker: speaker2
text: Maybe . After all , I am grown up now .
